title: Spring security advisory (AV26-373)
description: Between April 9 and 21, 2026, Spring published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: Spring Authorization Server  versions 1.3.0 to 1.3.10, 1.4.0 to 1.4.9 and 1.5.0 to 1.5.6
Spring Framework  versions 5.3.0 to 5.3.47, 6.1.0 to 6.1.26, 6.2.0 to 6.2.17 and 7.0.0 to 7.0.6
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
